rationale: Scope fence holds: `git show --name-only d327cdce` lists exactly the 5 declared files (internal/panel/create.go, internal/panel/create_test.go, cmd/mindspec/panel.go, cmd/mindspec/panel_test.go, .mindspec/domains/workflow/interfaces.md), one commit past base (ef58cf8b -> d327cdce), git status clean, no R1/R2/R4 files touched. Doc-sync verified against both plan Bead 3 (mindspec-zw81, plan.md:322-419) and the actual code: interfaces.md's new --gate paragraph correctly names the 5-key enum (spec_approve, plan_approve, bead, final_review, adhoc) matching config.PanelGateKeys, describes control-byte discipline before enum-membership check (matches panel.go order), documents the decision-inert field (neither PanelGateDecision nor ApproveThreshold reads it) and the PanelGateAdvisoryDefault read-through, and states the omitted-flag byte-identical contract. The CLI table row addition is accurate and non-duplicative. Cross-checked: no second enum literal (grep '"spec_approve"' in cmd/mindspec + internal/panel is empty), internal/panel stays config-free (go list -deps has no internal/config hit). No extra files, no extra commits, no doc/code mismatch found.
